(Discharge) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was receiving continuous oxygen therapy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
577 OXGN_INTRMTNT_ADMSN_CD OXGN_INTRMTNT_ADMSN_CD Therapies: Oxygen - Intermittent (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was receiving intermittent oxygen therapy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
578 OXGN_INTRMTNT_DSCHRG_CD OXGN_INTRMTNT_DSCHRG_CD
